studies.title:
Implementation of a digital nurse to improve the use of digital health applications for older people with depressive disorders (DiGA4Aged) -
A randomized proof of concept study.

_verification.reason: The study focuses on a digital nurse intervention to improve the use of digital health applications for depression, not specifically on the 'Selfapys Online-Kurs bei Binge-Eating-Störung'. The mention of 'Selfapys online course for depression' is related to a different condition and product.
